title: Examine the role of laws, rules, and regulations as sources of ethical guidance. Discuss their limitations in ensuring ethical conduct.
description: Q7. Examine the role of laws, rules, and regulations as sources of ethical guidance. Discuss their limitations in ensuring ethical conduct. (10 M) Difficulty Level: Medium Reference: InsightsIAS Why the question Growing dependence on formal legal frameworks to ensure ethical governance, despite recurring ethical lapses.
